artifact: .ddx/executions/20260425T092410-e9991cad/reviewer-stream.log

success
Clean implementation: typed ReviewVerdict struct, strict ParseReviewVerdict with sentinel ErrReviewVerdictUnparseable, prompt template rewritten to request JSON-only output (with "must NOT still request `### AC Grades`" assertion guarding regression). Old markdown extractor and its supporting helpers (`reVerdictLine`, `parseReviewACTable`, `extractReviewRationale`, `synthesizeReviewACsFromRationale`) are deleted. Type rename `ReviewVerdict` → `Verdict` cleanly separates the enum from the new struct. Result manifest reports task_succeeded with the expected test names.
